name: Kyckr
description: Kyckr delivers real-time business verification data directly from 300+ official company registers across 120+ countries, providing KYB primary-source documents and ongoing monitoring via API.

seo.title: Kyckr — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Kyckr: Kyckr delivers real-time business verification data directly from 300+ official company registers across 120+ countries, providing KYB primary-source doc

when_to_use: Real-time KYB from 300+ official company registries
Primary-source UBO data for AML due diligence
Ongoing business monitoring for KYB change alerts
Corporate document retrieval for regulated onboarding
Multi-jurisdiction business identity verification for banks

pros: Live data from 300+ official company registers
Primary-source KYB docs, not aggregated caches
Ongoing monitoring via API with change alerts
cons: Costs scale quickly with lookup volumes
Individual KYC and PEP screening not core
Smaller name than Moody's or Dun & Bradstreet
Some registries have inherent data latency
review.verdict: Strongest primary-source KYB registry API on offer; best paired with a separate KYC/AML vendor.
review.best_for: Compliance teams that need court-defensible primary-source company registry data globally
review.not_for: Buyers wanting one vendor for KYC, sanctions and KYB with bundled case management
